chain.thought: Explanation: They made the postseason in 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, and 2008 — 7 years. They did not make the postseason in 2005, 2009, and 2010 — 3 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows "did not make playoffs" in 2005, 2009, and 2010 (3 years). All other years (2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, 2008) indicate playoff qualification (7 years). Therefore, the counts are 7 years made the postseason and 3 years did not.
